name: image_load_side_load_third_party
raw_query: any where (file.path:"*\\commfunc.dll" and (not (file.path:"*\\AppData\\local\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\*" or (file.path like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Lenovo\\Communications Utility\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Lenovo\\Communications Utility\\*"))))) or (file.path:"*\\tosbtkbd.dll" and (not (file.path like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Toshiba\\Bluetooth Toshiba Stack\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Toshiba\\Bluetooth Toshiba Stack\\*"))))
